EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ITinTriangle

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control TIN triangles.

[Guid("3E541323-1132-11D2-92F7-444553540000")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ITinTriangle : ITinElement

Properties

Area

The projected area of the specified TIN triangle.

double Area { get; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

The area of the specified triangle as measured on the TIN surface.
